name: Feature request
about: Something naru should do that it doesn't yet
title: ""
labels: enhancement

---

Before filing: check [docs/spec.md](../../docs/spec.md) §1's "Is not
(deferred, resist scope creep)" table. If what you want is listed
there, it's probably deliberately out of scope for the reason given —
say why your case is different, rather than assuming it was an
oversight.

## What you want to do

## What naru does today instead

## Why the current behavior doesn't work for your case

## Would this fit naru's prime directives?

(spec.md §0 — no runtime network/LLM/randomness, deterministic,
fail-loud-on-drift, provenance as a column, golden-tested.) If your
request would require bending one of these, say which one and why it's
worth it — that's the actual design conversation, not a formality.
